gemini.prompt: Redraw this photo as a Piet Mondrian style portrait: keep the person's face, hair, and body clearly recognizable as a human figure with the same pose and proportions as the original photo, but simplify the coloring into flat solid regions using only white, black, and blocks of pure red, blue, and yellow, separated by bold black grid lines, like a Mondrian/De Stijl painting. Do not turn this into abstract non-representational shapes - the subject must still look like a person, just stylized with Mondrian's flat color-block technique. No gradients, no textures, no photographic shading.
